title: Templates are just frozen personas — unify the two models
description: The template JSON (schema_version 3.x with persona.identity/voice/principles/constraints/operating_instructions) is structurally isomorphic to a live persona record. Today templates, adopted-personas, and runtime agents are three parallel type universes with transform functions between them. Collapse them into one core 'PersonaSpec' type where a template is simply a PersonaSpec with status='template' + adoption_questionnaire metadata. Adoption becomes a spec-to-spec transformation (answer interpolation + connector binding), not a schema crossing.
reasoning: Every template change today ripples through multiple type definitions, transform functions, and UI renderers (matrix view, blueprint view, adoption wizard). Unifying the model removes whole classes of drift bugs and makes schema_version migrations tractable. This is the conceptual foundation that unlocks template-as-persona-snapshot and persona-as-template-fork.
